scripts.test:all: npm run test:coordinator && npm run test:sidecar && npm run verify:hooks
scripts.lint:python: ruff check hooks/*.py --ignore E501 && python3 -m py_compile hooks/*.py
scripts.lint:coordinator: node --check mcp-coordinator/index.js && npm --workspace mcp-coordinator run test:unit
scripts.verify:hooks: bash tests/hooks-smoke.sh && bash tests/test-hooks.sh && bash tests/health-check-regression.sh && pytest -q
scripts.ci:local: npm run lint:shell && npm run lint:python && npm run lint:coordinator && npm --workspace mcp-coordinator run test:coverage && npm run docs:audit && npm run typecheck:sidecar && npm run test:sidecar && npm run verify:hooks
scripts.docs:audit: npm run audit:endpoints && npm run audit:coverage-claim && npm run audit:artifact-contract && npm run audit:api-contract && npm run audit:changelog && npm run audit:workflow-pinning && npm run audit:security-review
scripts.release:gate: npm run ci:local && npm run release:security-smoke
